modules.title: Hazard Communication (GHS)
modules.frequency: Initial for all employees; when new chemical hazards are introduced; annual refresher recommended
modules.delivery: Classroom or toolbox talk with SDS practice
modules.documentation: Roster with names/signatures, date, trainer, topics; SDS access confirmation

modules.title: Lockout/Tagout — Authorized Employees
modules.frequency: Initial; retraining when job changes or procedures change; annual procedure audit
modules.documentation: Authorized list, device assignment, procedure sign-offs, annual audit records

modules.title: Machine Guarding and Safe Operations
modules.documentation: Roster, equipment covered, hazard review checklist

modules.title: Powered Industrial Trucks (Forklifts) Operator Certification
modules.frequency: Initial; evaluation at least every 3 years or after incident/unsafe operation
modules.delivery: Formal instruction, practical training, and evaluation
modules.documentation: Operator evaluation checklist, certification card, trainer qualifications

modules.title: Respiratory Protection
modules.frequency: Initial and annual; additional when changes in respirator or workplace occur
modules.delivery: Classroom + fit testing and medical evaluation coordination
modules.documentation: Fit test records, medical clearance, respirator assignments, training roster

modules.title: Hearing Conservation
modules.frequency: Annual training for employees with TWA ≥ 85 dBA; baseline and annual audiograms
modules.documentation: Audiometric test results, training rosters, HPD fit verification

modules.title: Electrical Safety-Related Work Practices (Awareness)
modules.frequency: Initial; refresher every 3 years or as needed

modules.title: Emergency Action Plan and Fire Extinguisher Use
modules.delivery: Classroom + evacuation drill; hands-on extinguisher use if permitted
modules.documentation: Drill records, evacuation maps, training rosters
